title: Creepypasta Mod
description: Mod that adds "Scary" monsters based off of Minecraft Mythos.
body:
# CREEPYPASTA MOD (TOTALLY NOT UNBALANCED)

## WHAT IT ADDS
### HEROBRINE
The infamous one. Is immune to all damage, and is slow. Spawns in ALL biomes.
### ENTITY 303
Herobrines forgotten brother. Has the same amount of health, but is immune to ALL damage and can oneshot, just like Herobrine. Is ALWAYS watching.
### RUBY ORE
A corrupted ore from the long past of Minecraft. Unfortunately, the tools no longer are in a stable state, resulting the block, ore and gem itself only remaining.
### CORRUPTED BIOME
A pitch black biome corrupted by a force outside of your control. Is home to wmkldwdijowdi.
### wmkldwdijowdi
A corrupted cow that is hostile to you, the player.
### "I_SEE_YOU"
A corrupted block which states the obvious. He can see you. There is no escape.
